review_content.Placements: There are a total of 250 students in our batch. The college fee is very high, and it is 15.5 lakhs per year for the 5.5-year span of the MBBS course. Students get internships in the final year of the course, which is the fifth year, and work in college hospitals only.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is average, and it is not so well-developed. There is no Wi-Fi available for students either in college or in the hostel. The network is very bad. Labs are good with proper equipment. Classrooms are good too. The mess food is not great and there is no canteen in college. Medical facilities are great. individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: The great chapters of Amaltas.

content.Placements: MBBS 2023 batch contains 250 students. The 1st batch of Amaltas is 250. The previous batches are 150 only. Packages corresponding to government internships or the bond we'll be competing for the scholarship amount will be for 5 years. The package will be at least 12 LPA, depending upon the area of the posting. Internships are for the 1 year students. The stipend was Rs. 15,500 for the 2023 batch.
content.Infrastructure: I'm a day scholar hence I knew less about the hostel facilities. Overall grading of the hostel is fine but there is Wi-Fi and network issues. The mess services are average. How it will be called a mess if it does not provide 5-star services. Classrooms are air-conditioned. For sports, there are different courts.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: MBBS: A private college life.

content.Placements: The batch in my college consists of 250 students. Internships are available for all 250 students. Learning opportunities are present. Although being a private college, it is well-standardized. We could apply for jobs in private and government hospitals as MBBS graduates after the course.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure of the college are well-developed. We have 2 girls' hostels and 2 boys' hostels along with a seperate college building and hospital building. Hostels are well-furnished and have 2 seater rooms available. Each room is well-spaced along with washrooms.

content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is average, and it is not so well-developed. There is no Wi-Fi available for students either in college or in the hostel. individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Review of Amaltas Institute of Medical Science.

content.Placements: There are no such placements and packages for MBBS pass out. But still, an MBBS pass out from Amaltas Institute of Medical Science can earn a minimum starting salary of Rs. 65,000 as a junior resident. But cracking PG and after further studies can earn as much needed.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is average. The campus has basic facilities, and infrastructure is also normal. The campus does not have an auditorium or a canteen. Almost all facilities are provided here. Transport facilities are also good. Bus facilities to all cities nearby are provided for free for students. Overall, it is in average condition. Our college is still developing. Further development will be seen in later years. The food provided in a mess is average. Hygiene is maintained. Still, much development is required. Special days need to be increased.

Considering the total tuition fee and the package secured aft

course_faqs.question: What is the academic calendar like for a BTech student at IIT Dharwad?
course_faqs.answer: One academic year at the IIT Dharwad BTech course is split into two semesters. The first semester usually runs from July to December, while the second runs from January to April. Most of your heavy learning happens during these months. Between these semesters, you'll get breaks, which many students use to take up internships or work on technical projects to add some practical experience to their resumes.

course_faqs.question: What are the "one-time" charges in BTech course at IIT Dharwad and are they refundable?
course_faqs.answer: At the time of admission, you pay a one-time fee of roughly INR 6,500 that covers admission processing, identity cards, and alumni membership; these are non-refundable. However, the INR 11,000 caution deposit (which includes library and institute security) is fully refundable after you complete your four-year course. You will also pay an annual medical insurance premium of approximately INR 1,500 to ensure on-campus healthcare coverage.

course_faqs.question: Are there any fee concessions for BTech at IIT Dharwad if my family income is low?
course_faqs.answer: Yes, IIT Dharwad does provide fee remission on the basis of family income-If your annual family income is less than INR 1 Lakh, your entire tuition fee is waived offIf your family income is between INR 1 - 5 Lakhs, you have to pay only 1/3rd of the tuition fee. It is important to note that waivers apply only to the tuition fee. You would need to pay the hostel, mess, development and other charges.

paragraphs: IIT Dharwad Application Process
IIT Dharwad conducts the application process for admission to its offered courses. However, for a few course candidates are required to complete the entrance exam's registration/application process.
IIT Dharwad Selection Process

Candidates are shortlisted based on their qualifications. Next candidates are required to go through the selection process which requires candidates to to go through the course-based entrance exam followed by other selection rounds (if applicable). After the selection rounds are completed, they are required to go through the course-wise counselling process for final seat allocation.IIT Dharwad PhD and MS admission process includes a college-conducted written test and personal interview.Seat AllocationSeat allocation for BTech is conducted by JoSAA (Joint Seat Allocation Authority).In order to be selected, students must participate in the counselling process after which seat allocation takes place.However, for MTech course candidates must participate in the Common Offer Acceptance Portal (COAP) for seat allocation.Final AdmissionOnce seat allocations are finalised, selected applicants must pay the admission charges along with the course fee to confirm their admission to the selected course.Candidates may have to visit the administration office of the college to get their documents verified offline.

IIT Dharwad course fee varies based on the course or specialisation chosen by the candidate. All the SC/ ST/ Divyangjan students are exempted from payment of the IIT Dharwad tuition fee. The following sections provide details of the IIT Dharwad fee of offered courses.

faqs.question: What happens after the JEE Advanced results are announced in June?
faqs.answer: Once the results are live in mid-June, the JoSAA (Joint Seat Allocation Authority) counselling begins. This is the most critical phase where you'll list IIT Dharwad as your preference. You'll need to be available during these weeks to freeze your seat, upload documents, and pay the seat acceptance fee online to lock in your spot.

placement_data.title: IIT Dharwad Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: IIT Dharwad placement cell conducts various activities to help students with their careers. It provides training on soft skills required for students to help in a team oriented job environment. IIT Dharwad placement report for 2025 has been disclosed. As per the report, Out of 147 students, 123 students secured placements. The highest and average packages provided to students from BTech , MTech and other courses stood at INR 38.5 LPA and INR 14.65 LPA, respectively. The median package stood at INR 12.18 LPA. Overall 109 companies participated in the placement season, Amazon, Oracle, TCS, Cognizant and many more were some of the top recruiters during IIT Dharwad placement season.

reviews.review_heading: Inside the best 3rd gen IIT.
reviews.review_text: The college has an amazing hostel with a fully air-conditioned mess, Wi-Fi, and power backup. The college has facilities like basketball, badminton, table tennis, fuss ball and 3 common rooms with a capacity of 100 students in each hostel. Every wing has 3 washing machines. The indoor facility has badminton, squash, volleyball, and a gym. Temporary grounds for cricket and football and a helipad. The medical facilities are very efficient with 24/7 working and an ambulance just a call away.

reviews.review_heading: Great things take time, and IIT Dharwad will shine.
reviews.review_text: As the college is in the developing phase, it is not the appropriate time to conclude about infrastructure, but till now the buildings are class, big, and enough to meet the requirements of an IIT. All the basic facilities are available to the students and staff members. We have a mess, a gymkhana, 2 hostels, one wellness center, etc. There is a lack of sports grounds, so we used it from the Walmi campus.

reviews.review_heading: I think, as a 3rd Gen IIT student, the placements are improving from year to year.
reviews.review_text: Nice buildings, nice hostel, nice mess, nice roads, nice gym, nice indoor stadium, nice people, nice staff, good atmosphere, environment, nice college, nice people, nice atmosphere for the library, and a very good library, nice chairs in the library, very high-class library.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure but come mentally prepared.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good, but hostel food is not. The classrooms and library are really nice. But, there are frequent power cuts. The Wi-Fi offers fast internet. There is a wellness center if you are sick, a sports complex to play games and a gym. Canteen food is affordable and tasty.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good faculty members who happily clear students' doubts.
reviews.review_text: They provide labs, equipment, materials, and everything. I'm still in my first year in this college, so I don't know about the engineering lab. Our seniors say that they are better than mechanical. Everything is good. Our college provides all facilities like a medical lab, hostel, canteen, and mess. The ground for cricket and football is under construction and will be available in the next year. There is a wellness center here for medical issues. We have a common indoor facility for indoor sport...

reviews.review_heading: IITs with best buildings, the latest IITs.
reviews.review_text: The buildings and infrastructure are quite amazing. As ours is a new generation IIT, everything was built recently, and everything is amazing. It feels good to experience things here, though there may be a little discomfort with Wi-Fi, but it’s okay. Everything provided is of fine quality.

reviews.review_heading: Campus has good infrastructure and food but placements are absolutely bad.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is quite good, as it’s a newly built college. It’s clean, and the buildings and hostels are kept cool. While there is no air-conditioner facility in the hostels, the classrooms are equipped with air-conditioners. However, the buildings are a bit far from each other, so you may prefer to cycle rather than walk.

reviews.review_heading: The basic idea about IIT Dharwad.
reviews.review_text: Talking about our facilities, we have access to 24/7 Wi-Fi and the library. As it is a 3rd-gen IIT, the infrastructure is not completed yet, so it can take 10 years to be fully developed. The food in the mess is average. The canteen is open till 3:00, so you can go there and enjoy. There is no restriction on roaming; you can roam around the campus. The medical facility here is available 24/7. We have a nurse, and the doctors visit daily, but in restricted time.

reviews.review_heading: Nice infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: All facilities are fine. But the signal of our sim is not available in the room. For outdoor games, we have to go to another campus named Walami which is near IIT Dharwad. All medical facilities are very nice. There is a separate shop for our general resources.

reviews.review_heading: Campus life at IIT Dharwad.
reviews.review_text:
The infrastructure here is amazing. As it's a new IIT, it's hostels are far better than the holder IITs. The hostels are equipped with good Wi-Fi but sometimes there may be temporary network issues. The classrooms here are well furnished and equipped with all the necessities required.
Mess food is above average, and there is also a night canteen that remains open till 3:00 am. 
Our campus's main motto is to make it a " Net Zero Campus," which will be self-sufficient for water and electricity and...

reviews.review_heading: The college provides excellent infrastructure and faculty.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure was excellent. They give free Wi-Fi. Labs, libraries, and classrooms are excellent with smart instruments. We have an indoor facility with a gym, badminton court, squash court, and table tennis court. We have adjusted for the food here. It is not tasty.

reviews.review_heading: Not satisfied with the mess, but satisfied with the faculty.
reviews.review_text: The thing that I like the most about my college is its infrastructure. We have a wide area in the library to study in a peaceful environment. But the mess is below average; we also have limited facilities in sports. There are only two hostel blocks for students so in each room there will be four members.

reviews.review_heading: One of the best IITs in south india.
reviews.review_text: As our IIT Dharwad is new generation IIT, which was started in 2016. All the buildings are super good and their infrastructure is super unique but the sad part of our campus is that Wi-Fi is not so good. But our college community assured us that they were going to fix that issue soon.

reviews.review_heading: Our college got good placements, but slightly dissatisfied with the mess.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is best compared among new generation IIT. The hostel facilities are good. We have a very good atmosphere to study in hostel rooms. But we don't have a permanent ground to play. We should go to a temporary campus to play sports like cricket and volleyball.

reviews.review_heading: I am actually satisfied with the faculty, but dissatisfied with the mess food.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is very good. The mess food quality is the worst; many times we see insects in our food. But they are trying to improve the quality now. Not even once a week they provide chicken to eat for free. We should buy coupons to eat chicken. Our college gym facilities and medical facilities are good.

faqs.answer: Puran Murti Campus admission to BTech and M.Tech is based on JEE Main, AIE CET and GATE entrance exams, respectively. However, for other UG, PG and Diploma courses college offers merit-based admission. To be eligible for admission, candidates also need to pass Class 10 and Class 12 for admission to UG courses and a graduation degree for admission to PG courses.

faqs.question: Is it easy to get admission to Puran Murti Campus?
faqs.answer: Puran Murti Campus admission is merit and entrance-based. The college accepts JEE Main and AME CET entrance exam for admission to BTech and M.Tech courses.Further, for other courses college offers merit based admission. To proceed with filling out the application form, applicants must visit the official website of the college and apply for the desired course. After fullfill out all the eligiblity and selection criteria it will be easier to secure a seat.

faqs.question: Is Puran Murti Campus admission open?
faqs.answer: Yes, Puran Murti Campus admission 2025 is open for all courses. PM Group of Institutions offers both merit and entrance-based admission. Interested applicants can visit the official websites to apply for admission.

faqs.question: How can I get admission to BTech course at PM Group of Institutions?
faqs.answer: PM Group of Institutions Sonepat course admission is majorly merit-based. However, admission to BTech and M.Tech courses is entrance-based. To get admitted to the Puran Murti Haryana campus, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the college. Further, candidates seeking admission to the BTech programme must be Class 12 passed with 45% (40% for students belongs to the reserved category). Further, the college accepts several entrance exams such as JEE Main, AIE CET, AME CET, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Good college with good knowledge.
reviews.review_text: Good facilities are available in Puran Murti campus and very good infrastructure is available for my course. Best computer labs for coding. Best computers with good processing speed. All books are available in the library. Good facilities are available in the hostel. Daily new variety of food is available. I like that.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is the best college in Delhi NCR.
reviews.review_text: All the facilities and infrastructure are available for all the courses and departments. Well-quality and fully airy labs are well managed, and healthy food is available in the mess and canteen. Medical facilities, sports and games, and good facilities for the hostel are also provided.

reviews.review_heading: I like my college a lot, and I assume that others will like it too, as it's a worthwhile college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the campus is to my liking as it has lots of greenery, a few big grounds, and many smaller ones. Although I didn't opt for a hostel, when I visited my friend, I noticed that the hostel was Wi-Fi equipped. Rooms were clean, and bathrooms were good. The food was to my liking, too.

reviews.review_heading: Best college in Sonipat for programming students.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a green environment, great classrooms and the best library. There is no air pollution as the area is full of greenery without any noise pollution. Well-furnished hostels and best quality foods are available. Medical facilities are available in case of an emergency. Food is also provided by the college. For cricket, there is the best ground and an auditorium is also available.

reviews.review_heading: Infrastructure, staff, and teachers are really good.
reviews.review_text: I mostly love the infrastructure of my campus. There are smart classes available on campus, proper lighting, false ceilings, proper windows, airy and big rooms are available. Wi-Fi is also available on all floors and offices. All types of books are available in the library. The food in my canteen is very hygienic and tasty.

reviews.review_heading: Education at best- Puran Murti campus.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good. All the labs are well-maintained. They have hangers for three aircraft to be placed. The environment is very good here. This campus is recommended for all students for different courses like B.Tech. Management and pharmacy.

reviews.review_heading: Puran Murti Campus is a Home-like College Where Students Meet Their Expectations.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are extraordinary. The campus is fully Wi-Fi enabled. The labs are equipped with all necessary equipment in all labs, including ECE, EE, Mechanical, Aviation, and CSE. The library includes all books, including the latest editions, and has subscriptions to all journals.

reviews.review_heading: Totally satisfied with infrastructure and faculty of my college.
reviews.review_text: Our campus is equipped with all facilities like Wi-Fi, classrooms, a moot court, and a spacious library. College has a lush green playground with cricket, football, basketball courts, etc. Hostel food is excellent. Medical facilities and doctors are available 24/7.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Puran Murti Campus.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available always. Classrooms are also fine and library too. I am not in the hostel but some of my friends told me that hostel facilities are good. Food quality is also good. The canteen of the college is very bad. For sports, there is a very big ground for playing cricket, football, etc.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college in my knowledge.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very good. The Wi-Fi facility is good. Labs are very good with all the instruments. The library has enough books and reference books. Our college provides very good classrooms. The quality of the food served in a mess is average. The college organises sports events from time to time for entertainment as well as for fitness purposes.

reviews.review_heading: The college is good and has good placements.
reviews.review_text: It is a lovely college with a lovely ground. There are various facilities provided in this college, and there are various types of labs like computer labs, pharmacy labs, mechanical labs, civil labs, etc. A canteen is also available.

reviews.review_heading: In my opinion my PM College Of Engineering is good.
reviews.review_text: PM College of Engineering, gives a good infrastructure of a class programme, the class is well-maintained, the college has good Wi-Fi speed connection, it is free for all students, the college maintains good sports facility, you can play a various game here. The medical facilities are also available.

reviews.review_heading: The college is very bad. Both money and life are wasted here.
reviews.review_text: The Wi-Fi facility is available, but there is no internet connection in it. The classrooms are very good. The labs are available, but there are no proper instruments in it. There are no medical facilities. Government schools mid-day meal is better than the canteen. The hostel rooms are in very poor condition. The facilities are illiterate.

reviews.review_heading: At the end the college is quite satisfying apart from faculty dissatisfaction.
reviews.review_text:
One of the best thing about college is infrastructure. It spreads in 60 acres of land. Wi-Fi facility is available all over the campus. Labs are available for all subjects. There is a large ground for games and other activities
There is a first aid room in college where a doctor is always present to lookout for students.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2015
individual_reviews.title: Not satisfied because there were no placements.

content.Placements: No one got placed from my batch. I have done mechanical engineering from this college in 2015, and I got 65% at that time. Not even one company visited the college for placements, but for electronics, only Micromax came from Uttarakhand. They took students at the worker level, no one got placed in the professional line.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of this college is okay. The Wi-Fi facility is provided for hostlers only, and the rooms are good in hostel including A/C facility. The labs and classrooms are good, but there was a shortage of lecturers. The canteen food was not good at my time. The staff of the college is not cooperative, they take a lot of fine on late payment of fee and for shortage of attendance.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: A review on the poor condition of KC college.

content.Placements: There are no placements in my class. I never heard of good placements in any big company. This college is only a money machine. Zero percent placement is provided to my batch and my seniors batch. No placements are provided for the civil department in my batch as well as the senior batch. People make fun of students because there are no placements.
content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is not good. There is no playground. We faced water problems several times. The hostel food is of poor quality. The lab's condition is very poor. There are old books in the library and no arrangement of new books. The hostel rooms are small and water quality is poor, no RO and water purifier are present. The medical facilities are average.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2015
individual_reviews.title: I do not recommend anyone to join this college unless he just needs a degree.

content.Placements: There are simply zero placements. On the name of placement, they call fake companies and advertise that in newspapers. Or otherwise, in very rare case, they will place you in some assembly line company on contract for like Rs. 6-7,000 per month, where you will find yourself working with labour class.
content.Infrastructure: No Wi-Fi is accessible for students. Toilets are even the worst than public toilets in old railway stations. The classroom condition is a pity. There is nothing in the name of games, and playing a cricket match once in a year is not sports. The labs and canteen are a joke. They are just making buildings and not even painting them, and there is nothing inside that buildings.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2015

content.Other: Best thing about this college is its location. It is situated between the mountains. Climate here remains very good. The college is backed by the government of Uttarakhand. It offers B.Tech in 4 streams. Faculty here is good and cooperative. Campus is also good with free Wi-Fi. College is not completely ragging free. Placement of this college is almost nil. Industry exposure is also very less. This college is still in growing phase and is not established yet.

reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very bad and unhygienic. There is no hostel on the campus, and the canteen food is very bad and also expensive. Sports are there in the college, but there is no Wi-Fi available. The libraries are not good, labs are available, but there is no Wi-Fi access.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has well qualified faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is excellent. There are beautiful buildings and we also have a large library. The college playground is huge. We play cricket, football, long jump, outdoor games, etc. There is also a basketball court in the college. The only disadvantage of the college is that there is no canteen.

reviews.review_heading: One of the best colleges In Muzaffarnagar.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: College is very good. The faculty members are good. There are fun activities organized on campus.

review_content.Placements: The package is based on the qualifications of the student. Since it is a government college, it directly provides jobs to students in the nearby district hospital. There are no top recruiting companies. Approximately 90% of student get their internship at the end of the course.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good, it contains 2 lecture halls of 200 student capacity. Wi-Fi is also available. The quality of hostel food is good. The mess is well-organised and has a perfect menu that rotates weekly. You can get ice cream and cold drinks in the hostel canteen. The medical facility provided is good. Many sports like badminton, volleyball, and cricket are also played here.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: Great infrastructure compared to other colleges. Facilities & equipment will take time to improve.

review_content.Placements: This is the first batch of this college. The first batch will pass out in 2029. As far as I know, there are no college placements for MBBS. Most students will prepare for the NEET postgraduate entrance exam since this is a medical college.
review_content.Infrastructure: The mess is cooperative. It is arranged by students themselves and is handled by the mess committee. The quality is okay so far. The library has Wi-Fi and good amenities. No sports facilities are available, but students have built volleyball and badminton courts.
